section: 2.2: Barbarian fishing, Green dragons and the Hallowed Sepulchre
stepText: After solving Horvik’s problem go to the southeast corner of Varrock, make two eagle disguises for Eagles’ Peak (and the spottier cape if you had the hunter level). Next world hop at the west bank anvils until you find Bob again and complete A Tail of Two Cats (lamp on slayer).
itemsNeeded: catspeak amulet, law runes, air staff, earth runes (all for next section)
